# Content and Asset Authorization Template

- Business name:

## Authorization

The Client authorizes {{your_business_name}} to use the following approved materials for the Client's website and related project files:

- business name and contact information,
- approved service descriptions,
- approved logo files,
- approved photographs,
- approved testimonials or reviews,
- approved videos,
- approved legal or regulatory language.

## Client Confirmation

By signing below, the Client confirms that:

- the information provided is accurate to the best of the Client's knowledge,
- the Client owns the supplied assets or has permission to use them,
- the Client authorizes their use on the website and in related project materials,
- the Client has reviewed the final content or will review it before launch.

## Notes

If any content was initially drafted using publicly available business information, the Client understands that the final published version will be based on Client approval and authorized assets.
